config.name: Variable Name
config.label: Nombre de variable
config.helper: Un nombre de variable es un nombre simbólico para hacer referencia a la información.

config.label: Etiqueta
config.helper: La etiqueta describe el nombre del campo

config.name: Data Type
config.label: Tipo de dato
config.helper: El tipo de dato especifica qué tipo de datos se almacenan en la variable.

config.name: Data Format
config.label: Formato de datos
config.helper: El formato de datos para el tipo seleccionado.

config.label: Reglas de validación
config.helper: Las reglas de validación necesarias para este campo

config.label: Texto de marcador de posición
config.helper: El marcador de posición es lo que se muestra en el campo cuando aún no se proporciona ningún valor

config.label: Texto auxiliar
config.helper: El texto de ayuda está destinado a proporcionar orientación adicional sobre el valor del campo

config.label: Color de texto
config.helper: Establezca el color de texto del elemento

config.label: Color de fondo
config.helper: Establecer el color de fondo del elemento

config.label: valor predeterminado
config.helper: El valor predeterminado se rellena previamente con los datos existentes de la solicitud. Esta característica le permitirá modificar el valor que se muestra cuando se carga la pantalla si es necesario.

config.label: Regla de visibilidad
config.helper: Este control está oculto hasta que esta expresión sea verdadera

config.label: Device Visibility
config.helper: Este control está oculto hasta que esta expresión sea verdadera

config.label: Custom Format String
config.helper:
Use the Mask Pattern format
Date ##/##/####
SSN ###-##-####
Phone (###) ###-####

config.label: Nombre del selector CSS
config.helper: Use esto en sus reglas de css personalizadas

config.label: etiqueta aria
config.helper: Atributo diseñado para ayudar a la tecnología de asistencia (por ejemplo, lectores de pantalla) a adjuntar una etiqueta

config.label: Orden de tabulación
config.helper: Orden en el que un usuario moverá el foco de un control a otro pulsando la tecla Tab

configs.label: Entrada máxima
configs.helper: Valide que un atributo no sea mayor que una longitud determinada.

configs.label: Entrada mínima
configs.helper: Valida que un atributo tenga al menos una longitud determinada.

config.helper: El valor predeterminado se rellena previamente con los datos existentes de la solicitud. Esta característica le permitirá modificar el valor que se muestra cuando se carga la pantalla si es necesario.

scripts.title: DocuSignSendTemplate
scripts.code:
<?php

$config = $data['_parent']['config'];
// Parameters
$templateId = mustache($config['templateId'], $data);
$waitCompleted = getValue($config, 'waitCompleted', false);
$configRoles = getValue($config, 'templateRoles', []);
$outputVariable = $config['outputVariable'] ?? '';

// Set Recipient Information
$templateRoles = [];
foreach ($configRoles as $role) {
    switch ($role['type']) {
        case 'user':
            $user = $api->users()->getUserById($role['selectedRecipientId']);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user->getEmail(),
                'name' => $user->getFullname(),
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'userId':
            $user = evaluateUserIdExpression($role['userIdExpression'], $data);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user['email'],
                'name' => $user['fullname'],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'requester':
            $request = $api->processRequests()->getProcessRequestById($data['_parent']['request_id']);
            $user = $api->users()->getUserById($request->getUserId());
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $user->getEmail(),
                'name' => $user->getFullname(),
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'manager':
            $manager = getProcessManager($data['_parent']['request_id']);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $manager['email'],
                'name' => $manager['fullname'],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
        case 'email':
            $expressions = [
                $role['email'],
                $role['name'],
            ];
            $mustacheEvaluatedData = evaluateMustacheExpressions($expressions, $data);
            $templateRoles[] = [
                'email' => $mustacheEvaluatedData[$role['email']],
                'name' => $mustacheEvaluatedData[$role['name']],
                'roleName' => $role['roleName'],
            ];
            break;
    }
}

// Access information
$appUrl = getenv('APP_URL');
$accessToken = getValue($data, 'docusign.access_token', getenv('docusign_access_token'));
if ($accessToken === null) {
    $accessToken = getGlobalAccessToken();
}
$docusignUser = getValue($data, 'docusign.user', json_decode(getenv('docusign_userinfo') ?: '{}', true));
if (empty($accessToken) || empty($docusignUser)) {
    throw new Exception('Missing authorization codes. Before you can make any API calls you must authorize Docusign');
}
$docusignUri = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['base_uri'] ?: 'https://demo.docusign.net';
$accountId = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['account_id'];

$body = [
    'templateId' => $templateId,
    'templateRoles' => $templateRoles,
    'status' => 'sent',
];

// Add event callback
if ($waitCompleted) {
    $requestId = $data['_request']['id'];
    $key = md5("pm4{$requestId}docusign");
    $callbackUrl = "{$appUrl}/docusign/event/{$key}/{$requestId}";
    $body['eventNotification'] = [
        'url' => $callbackUrl,
        'loggingEnabled' => true,
        'requireAcknowledgment' => true,
        'envelopeEvents' => [
            [
                'envelopeEventStatusCode' => 'Completed',
                'includeDocuments' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ];
} else {
    $callbackUrl = null;
}

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignUri}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{$accountId}/envelopes",
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Accept: application/json',
        "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

if ($outputVariable) {
    $response = json_decode($response, true);

    return [$outputVariable => $response, 'callbackUrl' => $callbackUrl];
} else {
    return ['callbackUrl' => $callbackUrl];
}

// Helpers:

function mustache($mustache, $data)
{
    return preg_replace_callback('/\{\{\s*(\w+)s*\}\}/', function ($match) use ($data) {
        return getValue($data, $match[1]);
    }, $mustache);
}

function getValue(array $array, $key, $default = '')
{
    foreach (explode('.', $key) as $segment) {
        if (array_key_exists($segment, $array)) {
            $array = $array[$segment];
        } else {
            return $default;
        }
    }

    return $array;
}

function getGlobalAccessToken()
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/check-token",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);
    curl_close($curl);

    return $response ? json_decode($response)->token : null;
}

function getProcessManager($requestId)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/process_manager/{$requestId}",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'GET',
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

function evaluateUserIdExpression($userIdExpression, $data)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    $body = [
        'expression' => $userIdExpression,
        'data' => $data,
    ];
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/user_by_expression",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

function evaluateMustacheExpressions($expressions, $data)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    $baseUrl = getenv('HOST_URL');
    $accessToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');
    $body = [
        'expressions' => $expressions,
        'data' => $data,
    ];
    curl_setopt_array($curl, [
        CURLOPT_URL => "{$baseUrl}/api/1.0/docusign/evaluate_mustache_expressions",
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
        CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
            'Accept: application/json',
            "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
            'Content-Type: application/json',
        ],
    ]);
    $response = curl_exec($curl);

    return json_decode($response, true);
}

scripts.title: DocuSignCustomEnvelope
scripts.code:
<?php

// Parameters
$emailSubject = mustache($config['emailSubject'], $data);
$content = mustache($config['content'], $data);
$documentName = mustache($config['documentName'], $data);
$signalId = mustache($config['signalId'], $data);
$recipients = getValue($data, $config['recipients']);
$outputVariable = $config['outputVariable'] ?? '';

// Access information
$apiUrl = getenv('API_HOST');
$accessToken = getValue($data, 'docusign.access_token', getenv('docusign_access_token'));
$docusignUser = getValue($data, 'docusign.user', json_decode(getenv('docusign_userinfo') ?: '{}', true));
if (empty($accessToken) || empty($docusignUser)) {
    throw new Exception('Missing authorization codes. Before you can make any API calls you must authorize Docusign');
}
$docusignUri = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['base_uri'] ?: 'https://demo.docusign.net';
$accountId = $docusignUser['accounts'][0]['account_id'];

// Verify $recipients
if (is_array($recipients)) {
    foreach ($recipients as $index => $recipient) {
        if (empty($recipient['recipientId'])) {
            $recipients[$index]['recipientId'] = $index + 1;
        }
        if (empty($recipient['routingOrder'])) {
            $recipients[$index]['routingOrder'] = $index + 1;
        }
    }
} else {
    throw new Exception('Invalid recipients');
}

$body = [
    'emailSubject' => $emailSubject,
    'documents' => [
        [
            'documentBase64' => base64_encode($content),
            'name' => $documentName,
            'fileExtension' => 'html',
            'documentId' => '1',
        ],
    ],
    'recipients' => [
        'signers' => $recipients,
    ],
    'status' => 'sent',
];
if ($signalId) {
    $body['eventNotification'] = [
        'url' => "{$apiUrl}/docusign/event/{$signalId}",
        'loggingEnabled' => true,
        'requireAcknowledgment' => true,
        'envelopeEvents' => [
            [
                'envelopeEventStatusCode' => 'Completed',
                'includeDocuments' => false,
            ],
        ],
    ];
}

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, [
    CURLOPT_URL => "{$docusignUri}/restapi/v2.1/accounts/{$accountId}/envelopes",
    CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
    CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
    CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
    CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
    CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
    CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
    CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
    CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => json_encode($body),
    CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
        'Accept: application/json',
        "Authorization: Bearer {$accessToken}",
        'Content-Type: application/json',
    ],
]);
$response = curl_exec($curl);
curl_close($curl);

if ($outputVariable) {
    $response = json_decode($response, true);

    return [$outputVariable => $response];
} else {
    return [];
}

// Helpers:

function mustache($mustache, $data)
{
    return preg_replace_callback('/\{\{\s*(\w+)s*\}\}/', function ($match) use ($data) {
        return getValue($data, $match[1]);
    }, $mustache);
}

function getValue(array $array, $key, $default = '')
{
    foreach (explode('.', $key) as $segment) {
        if (array_key_exists($segment, $array)) {
            $array = $array[$segment];
        } else {
            return $default;
        }
    }

    return $array;
}
